goal: Full correctness + performance audit with per-filter regression protection and staged rollout

profilingCommands.queryStats: SELECT * FROM pg_stat_statements WHERE query ILIKE '%filtered_obs%' ORDER BY mean_exec_time DESC LIMIT 50;

rollout: Phase 1: baseline profiling + audit harness merge (no behavior change)
Phase 2: high-risk filter refactors behind feature flag
Phase 3: index additions from EXPLAIN findings
Phase 4: staged enablement in staging with telemetry guardrails
Phase 5: production canary, fallback toggle, then full rollout
exitCriteria: Every filter has dedicated unit tests for valid/invalid/ignored behavior
Pairwise matrix passes for SQL + metadata correctness
Worst-case p95 latency reduced and documented
